name: Musk
why_line: [why-line pending]

name: Trump
why_line: [why-line pending]

name: Abel
why_line: Berkshire's new hand: tripled the Alphabet stake then deployed $16.8B more - the quietest capital in America just picked a side in the AI war.

name: Warsh
why_line: Took the Fed chair through the most divisive confirmation in its history - with his predecessor still on the Board watching him.

name: Bessent
why_line: Running Economic Fury, the sanctions campaign he's selling to the G7 - the administration's market-facing enforcer.

name: Andreessen
why_line: a16z money is wiring itself into DC ahead of the midterms - the Valley's kingmaker is building a capture machine.

name: Dimon
why_line: Contract through '27, personally pitching the SpaceX roadshow, JPMorgan money inside Bezos's Prometheus - the banker in every room.

name: Nadella
why_line: Microsoft cuts its own employees off from Claude Fable 5 — Nadella, both competitor and customer, joins the pile-on as Anthropic's enterprise base starts to wobble in the same week Washington moved against it.

name: Warren
why_line: Lost the Warsh fight but owns the opposition - antagonist-in-chief to both other cities, and her bill is still moving.

name: Altman
why_line: State AGs open a coordinated probe into OpenAI's ad and health-data practices just as Altman races to file — the tobacco playbook arrives at the worst possible moment for the IPO.

name: Huang
why_line: Still the toll booth on every AI buildout - a single sentence from him moves stocks 10%, and he's buying his way into AI software.

name: Gray
why_line: Blackstone relaxed its redemption gates to project confidence - then a fund hit the 10% wall anyway. The credit stress wears his face.

name: Powell
why_line: Handed Warsh the chair but kept his Board seat - the in-house dissident with two years left and a warning shot already fired.

name: Pichai
why_line: [why-line pending]

name: Bezos
why_line: [why-line pending]

name: Fink
why_line: HPS put BlackRock's $14T machine deep inside the private credit stress - and his money is quietly inside Bezos's Prometheus too.

name: Jassy
why_line: AWS is the compute landlord of the AI race - courting OpenAI for Alexa while Amazon money backs Anthropic. Playing both sides.

name: Hassabis
why_line: DeepMind's models power Gemini's run at ChatGPT's market share - the lab quietly winning the frontier race from inside Google.

name: Solomon
why_line: #1 in M&A with record revenues - Goldman's deal machine sits at the toll booth of the IPO wave Musk, Altman, and Amodei are about to ride.

name: Rowan
why_line: Gated his flagship credit fund at 45 cents on the requested dollar and called peers idiots - the loudest voice insisting the private credit fire is containable.

name: Atkins
why_line: The SEC's posture on crypto and the AI IPO wave runs through his desk - including whether Musk's consent order gets rolled back.

name: Ferguson
why_line: Antitrust is DC's main weapon against the Valley - the Google remedies fight and the platform probes run through his FTC.

name: Karp
why_line: 84% government revenue growth and 'unusual operations' for the state while ICE backlash grows - the man who lives in the DC-SV seam.

name: Griffin
why_line: Feuding with New York's mayor, 'done sucking up' to the White House, backing a Spirit bailout - Wall Street's most openly political combatant.

name: Schwarzman
why_line: Blackstone loosened its gates while Apollo held firm - a public bet that confidence beats caution in the credit stress.

name: Zuckerberg
why_line: Beijing forces Zuckerberg to tear apart a $2B done deal — the first reversal of a completed US-China AI acquisition, and a sign the entire cross-border corridor just slammed shut.

name: Amodei
why_line: Washington unilaterally pulled the plug on Anthropic's most powerful models — the first time the government has recalled a deployed commercial AI, and a precedent that hangs over Amodei's entire IPO.

name: Blanche
why_line: AG nominee, three ledger appearances - one confirmation vote from the board.

name: Pulte
why_line: Acting DNI amid bipartisan fury - chaos generates events.

name: Krishnan
why_line: Departed WH AI advisor - watch where he lands.

name: Massie
why_line: Led the war-powers rebuke that cost the President 8 points.

name: Ellison
why_line: [why-line pending]

name: Hegseth
why_line: Hegseth brags the Pentagon kicked Anthropic out 'forever' three months ago — and Mark Kelly's backing makes the pile-on bipartisan, the signal Amodei should fear most.
